---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my workflowR documentation of the CryoZoo project to profile Tetrapod cell lines using a diverse set of genomics methods.

Click on this [link](Generate_Lists.html) to see how I selected the species from the cryozoo inventory.

Click on this [link](Cryo_zoo_summary.html) to see this information plotted.
